# CWE-212 positive: backup JSON still contains card number (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-212-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type chargeRecord struct {
	Payer string `json:"payer"`
	PAN   string `json:"pan"`
}

// CWE-212 Improper Removal of Sensitive Information Before Storage or Transfer
// Vulnerable line: exports full struct including PAN field.
func PublishReceipts(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, rows []chargeRecord) {
	payload, err := json.Marshal(rows)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "encode", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write(payload)
}
